site.name: Kuran.studio
site.description: The first digital platform to read and study the Noble Quran in multiple languages.
site.description.meta: Read and study the Noble Quran online with translations in 80+ languages. Free, clean, and ad-free.
khatm.title: Khatm
khatm.label: YOUR KHATMS
khatm.subtitle: Track your journey through the Noble Quran. Set a daily goal, build a streak, and see your progress grow.
khatm.empty.title: Start your first Khatm
khatm.empty.desc: Pick a goal you can keep — a few ayahs a day, a juz a week, whatever fits your life. You can always change it.
landing.subtitle: The first digital platform to read and study the Noble Quran in multiple languages.
landing.mockup.label: QURAN READER
landing.mockup.title: The Noble Quran
landing.mockup.desc: Read 114 surahs with translation, Arabic text, and footnotes. No ads, no barriers.
landing.features.label: FEATURES
landing.features.title: Everything in one place
landing.features.1.title: Simple Reader
landing.features.1.desc: Read surahs and ayahs with a clean, clear interface. Arabic and translation side by side.
landing.features.2.title: Advanced Search
landing.features.2.desc: Find ayahs and topics across the entire Quran. Search in your language or Arabic.
landing.features.3.title: Save Progress
landing.features.3.desc: Save your bookmarks and return later where you left off.
landing.features.4.title: Day / Night Theme
landing.features.4.desc: Switch between light and dark themes for comfortable reading anytime.
landing.features.5.title: Quality Translation
landing.features.5.desc: Complete translations with footnotes and detailed commentary.
landing.features.6.title: Notes & Reflections
landing.features.6.desc: Add your personal notes for every ayah you read.
landing.howto.label: HOW IT WORKS
landing.howto.title: Three steps to get started
landing.howto.1.title: Sign Up
landing.howto.1.desc: Create an account with Google. Free and fast.
landing.howto.2.title: Choose a Surah
landing.howto.2.desc: Browse 114 surahs of the Noble Quran and choose which one to read.
landing.howto.3.title: Start Reading
landing.howto.3.desc: Read ayahs in Arabic with translation. Add notes and save your progress.
landing.cta2.title: Start your journey
landing.cta2.subtitle: Join Quran readers worldwide. Free forever.
reader.title: The Noble Quran
reader.subtitle: 114 surahs
reader.translation.label: Sahih International Translation
login.title: Sign in to Kuran.studio
login.subtitle: Continue with Google to start reading the Noble Quran.
